entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop grown in northern India, subject to yield loss in cooler environments

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: The ratio of grain yield to total biomass, which is lowered by low night temperatures

entities.name: COLD TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to maintain productivity and growth under low temperature conditions

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The total agricultural output of the crop, which is low in cooler environments

entities.name: LOW TEMPERATURE
entities.description: Cooler environments and low night temperatures that induce flower shedding and pod set failure

entities.name: NORTHERN INDIA
entities.description: The geographic region where chickpea is grown in cooler environments

entities.name: HISAR
entities.description: A specific location in Haryana, India, characterized by cooler environments

entities.name: HARYANA
entities.description: A state in northern India where Hisar is located

entities.name: SINK POTENTIAL
entities.description: The capacity of the plant to realize its potential for grain production

entities.name: FLOWER SHEDDING
entities.description: The loss of flowers induced by low night temperatures

entities.name: POD SET FAILURE
entities.description: The failure of flowers to develop into pods due to low night temperatures

entities.name: VEGETATIVE GROWTH
entities.description: The growth of non-reproductive plant parts, which increases when assimilates are diverted from reproductive organs
